newsSinceJun6: No material company-specific news since June 6, 2026. Last fundamental catalysts remain late-April/early-May: record Q1 2026 (rev NT$11.8B +73% YoY, EPS NT$9.12), SLT adoption by NVIDIA/AMD/Google with a possible SLT forecast upgrade, and a CPO Insertion 4E (BER/signal test) pilot run scheduled to start in June 2026 - all already public and in the price. Today's -2.45% looks like flow-driven profit-taking after a +200% YTD run (+~38% in the past month), not a fundamental event. Sell-side is now unanimous Strong Buy (15 buys, 0 sells), confirming the name is no longer underfollowed.

sources.label: BigGo Finance - Chroma ATE Q1 2026 earnings call (record Q1, SLT upgrade considered, CPO Insertion 4E pilot June 2026)
DIGITIMES - Chroma ATE record 1Q26 revenue/profit on AI server SLT and photonics orders
TradingView - TWSE:2360 quote and recent performance (pullback, 1M/1Y moves, analyst ratings)

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's down move already penalized the ~200% YTD rerating and crowding; today's -2.45% drift brings no new information, and a 2-3% dip after a triple does not restore hidden-alpha asymmetry on a crowding-sensitive list. Unanimous Strong Buy coverage keeps eroding the 'underfollowed' premise, hence a small negative drift rather than another rank cut.
verdicts.bull: SLT design wins at all three top AI/HPC chip vendors (NVIDIA, AMD, Google) plus AI server power test make Chroma a genuine multi-vector test bottleneck; the June CPO Insertion 4E pilot could open a fourth leg before it is fully modeled.
verdicts.neutral: Fundamentals are excellent but fully broadcast - record Q1 and the SLT/CPO story are consensus, so the stock now trades on momentum and AI-capex beta rather than discovery alpha.
verdicts.bear: At ~$33B market cap after +200% YTD and 15/15 buy ratings, any AI-capex digestion or SLT order pushout triggers a sharp de-rating with little valuation support; residual alpha is largely spent.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Formal upward revision of the SLT forecast and/or CPO Insertion 4E pilot converting to volume purchase orders in H2 2026.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowded post-rerating positioning unwinding on any AI test-capex pause; consensus Strong Buy leaves no incremental buyer.
